item_specifications.special_feature: Durable, Easy to Clean, Non Skid Bottom, Removable Cover, Water Resistant

about_item: Durable Ripstop Ballistic Cover: The heavy-duty cover withstands scratching, digging, and occasional mouthing or light chewing. Great for dogs that like to get a little rough with their beds! Please note that this is not a chew proof bed and it is not recommended for dogs that chew heavily or constantly on their bedding.

Rectangle Shape: The rectangle shape of the bed provides plenty of room for dogs to stretch out and relax. This style is perfect for pups that like to sprawl out while sleeping. Available in sizes ranging from small to XXL, this bed can accommodate any breed.

USA-Made: The bed mattress is made from CertiPUR-US certified shredded foam manufactured in the USA. This foam has been third-party tested to meet rigorous content, durability, and emissions standards, ensuring the quality and longevity of your dog's bed.

Soft Pillow Fill: Our shredded foam makes for a dense but soft filling that allows your dog to sink down into their bedding. Perfect for any pups (big or small!) that like to nest and snuggle into their beds.

Easy Clean: The ballistic cover is fur, dirt, stain, and odor resistant. Water and fur wipe right off, allowing for easy spot cleaning. For a deeper clean, the cover can be removed and machine washed. A dual-closure system consisting of a zipper under a flap of industrial-strength hook and loop fastener keeps the cover firmly secure while the bed is in use.

features.title: Original
features.text: Our Tough covers are made from 1200D Rip-Stop ballistic fabric. It has a smooth, slick texture that fur and dirt won't stick to.

features.title: Velvet
features.text: This is our original Rip-Stop ballistic fabric, but with a fuzzy coating that makes it soft to the touch. Extra comfy, but may attract fur and dirt more easily.

features.title: Liner
features.text: Our mattress liners are made from 600D Rip-Stop ballistic fabric. These are much more durable than standard bed liners and protect against wear and tear.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed well-made, comfortable, and easy to wash, with the cover wiping off easily. The size receives positive feedback, and customers consider it worth the money. However, the durability, chew resistance, and softness receive mixed reviews - while some find it super fluffy, others say the material isn't soft and cushiony, and while some consider it chew-proof, others note it's not completely chew-proof.

authors_reviews.title: If anything, more durable and well made than product description! (how unusual).
authors_reviews.text: Fantastic product! Expensive per unit, but low cost in the long run. With six large dogs (largest 195lb/88Kg), one of whom is nicknamed "the shredder" we have gone through a LOT of dog beds. We have three K9 ballistic beds now (two large, one x-large) and have been using them for close to a year. Zero damage! and after many pee accidents (you would not believe how much pee comes out of a 30-40 pound Leonberger puppy) directly on the cushions we realized when removing the covers to wash them that the inside of the cover is rubberized. Outside stunk. Cushion inside perfectly clean. After a run through the wash (cold water, air dry) looks brand new.Previously we were replacing dog beds frequently, either because too filthy to get clean or ripped to shreds. These beds look like they will last many years.
authors_reviews.author: jmpfas

authors_reviews.title: Best dog beds ever...
authors_reviews.text: So we bought this about a year ago, and have since bought a smaller bed for a different area of the house. First off, let me say we love it. The size, durability, and ease of use. ( Washing, drying, re installing cover). The ONLY negative about this product is the bottom side of the cover has little black dots that help prevent it from sliding around I assume. They are an absolute pain when you wash/dry the cover ! They always come off and get everywhere. That's the only complaint we have but 5 mins of vacuuming out the dryer and floor area around dryer and problem solved. Highly recommend these beds ! Stop with the $100 beds from PetSmart or Costco. The price may seem high, but will outlast all those other beds 10x.Edit!!!!02/04/2026. We trashed the 2 old covers(DONT PUT THEM IN THE DRYER).We bought new covers and air dry them, and the black dots on bottom no longer come off. We will continue to recommend these to everyone who asks. We will likely have these new bed covers for 5+ years now since we aren't drying them in a dryer.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: High quality and durable pet bed.
authors_reviews.text: The bed is very nice, seems high quality and durable for all pets, including dogs and cats. Our bed arrived earlier than expected and the shipping box arrived in good shape. The bed and bed cover was packaged nicely and easy to assemble. A surprise dog ball was included and was a fun surprise! The color of the bed is more like a deep royal blue color rather than the lighter blue as pictured. I’m a little sad about the actual color as I wanted the color that’s pictured as blue quartz. Everything else is great though. My two cats are having the best time playing in the box that came and enjoy the bed as well.
authors_reviews.author: Will

authors_reviews.title: Customer Service is NON existanct
authors_reviews.text: Edit: I've called so many times now and one person just hung up on me. Horrible company all around for how they run you around... I would NEVER recommend to anyone due to that alone. I won't hold my breath waiting for a new coverI really had high hopes for this bed. It is a actual dog bed and not some thin worthless padding but it only lasted 48hrs before Jemma took an entire corner out of it. I refuse to pay that much for an aluminum frame with an inch of padding for the 'chew proof' version as it is not a dog bed but dog padding. I've purchased a rip stop bed from Walmart that lasted much much longer at a fraction of the cost. I guess I'll just use the 200.00 bed for one of my other dogs and keep buying her the inexpensive ones where she at least has some padding that is more than an inch thick or just use blankets like I did previously. I also had to call two different times to be able to even file for the warranty as it would not let me directly do it online so I'm waiting to see how the warranty goes. After 6 call and several emails, they have finally shipped the replacement cover that I could NOT order online but at least someone there ordered via phone. Same person then spelled my name wrong after I spelled it for her and she was looking at the original purchase online so she had no reason to misspell it other than being a jerk. Still waiting on the phone call that I was supposed to receive a week ago... Before buying from this company, check out reviews posted other places and not from their website including BBB reviews. NEVER AGAIN
authors_reviews.author: mel

authors_reviews.title: Best Investment Ever!
authors_reviews.text: This is one of the best investments I have ever made. My dog is famous for tearing everything up that she is given to lay on. Bed after bed, I kept trying again. I wanted her to be comfy, but she never appeared to agree. It seems like a lot of money, but if you do the math in beds that you'll keep replacing over time, this is something you want to buy. It's been about five months, and it still looks as good as new.My dog wasn't a tearer so much as she was a burrower. She tried to move blankets, etc around to lie down in a more comfortable position. She tried that twice and gave up. Now, she finds it enjoyable just to plop down. The bed, at first, was a little noisy because of the type of material, but it wasn't intolerable. It was just a loud shuffle until the dog settled down. After a few weeks, it became more malleable and the noise went away.The mattress being manufactured with the "channels" is terribly amazing. It keeps the fluff right where it belongs. The filling doesn't all move away from the usual place that the dog lies. It does move a little, but a slight fluff fixes that. If the mattress ever fails, you can just open it up and put a cheaper mattress inside and the dog won't tear it up. Still saving money.The Velcro closure makes it easy to open and close for washing. And it's strong enough that they dog doesn't pull it open or use that spot to get into the insides. I've washed it twice, and the Velcro still opens and closes like new.Overall, this is a spectacular product. I am going to get one for a friend of mine. And I'm considering getting another for me for another room in the house. I'll never be forced to buy another dog bed out of need again. This will pay dividends in the long run. I would definitely recommend this product to anyone and everyone who has a pet.
authors_reviews.author: Nicki
